case_title: RENEE SNYDER VS. VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALIST, LP

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-21-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-21-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF RENEE SNYDER. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALIST, LP'S REPRESENTATIVES: JUDITH GOODMAN (HOSPITAL ADMINISTRATOR) AND NANCY RINKARDT (REGIONAL MEDICAL DIRECTOR.) PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-21-2016 - JUDGMENT. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: S. LE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALIST, LP
ORDER (SC-108) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT: THE COURT MAKES THE FOLLOWING ORDER[X] THE REQUEST IS DENIED.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $50.00 SERVED SEP-08-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALIST, LP
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER FILED BY PLAINTIFF SNYDER, RENEE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SNYDER, RENEE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALIST, LP THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DOES NOT SUPPORT A CONCLUSION THAT THE DEFENDANT FELL BELOW THE STANDARD OF CARE IN TREATING THE CAT, WAFFLE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,435.66 FILED BY SNYDER, RENEE AS TO DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALIST, LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-21-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY DEFENDANT VCA SAN FRANCISCO VETERINARY SPECIALIST, LP
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED JAN-03-2017 ORDERED DESTROYED
